description: Use this API to define an owner subsystem. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.0.0. ierr = osys(sid, num, owners)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Valid owner subsystem id. valid owner subsystem ids range from 0 to 11. (input).

parameters.name: owners
parameters.description: An array of NUM elements specifying array that contains the owners to set. (input).
